name: offline-sync
description: Sync engine for offline-first mobile flows (pitch-side attendance) per blueprint §10.16. Ships ONE owned entity: `SyncCursor` (per-device per-entity high-water-mark; ephemeral 30-day rolling). Client-side change queue + pull/push sync + conflict resolution (last-write-wins for scalar; merge for attendance). Per-tenant sync tokens; idempotent replay. Primary consumer is sports/attendance for coach offline check-in on the field. Mobile app (Capacitor) consumes REST + this sync channel.

attribute_driven.description: Entities opt into offline sync via `#[AsSyncableEntity]`. Boot-time compiler registers the entity in SyncableEntityRegistry so the sync endpoints know how to pull/push.

attributes.AsSyncableEntity: Marks a model as syncable. `#[AsSyncableEntity(entityType: 'attendance_record', conflictStrategy: 'last_write_wins')]`.
